fields.title: tau hardening: remove remaining 'any' from beads, status, worked-for
fields.description:
Complete the work started in tau-9kr by removing the remaining 'any' usage in the following components:
- beads/index.ts
- status/index.ts
- worked-for/index.ts
- task/index.ts
- task/runner.ts
fields.close_reason: Done: removed any usage from beads, status, worked-for, task/index.ts, and task/runner.ts.
